content: Keita Bick Ohshiro is a master student of Integrated Digital Media at the New York University. My research interests include Physical Computing, Internet of Things, Human Computer Interaction, and any programmable matters.

content:
The mirror reflects any shape captured by the camera. This work is done with my respect to Daniel Rozin, an art professor at NYU.
Date: December 2018
Material: Raspberry Pi, 256 servo motors, camera
summary: The mirror reflects any shape captured by the camera. This work is done with my respect to Daniel Rozin, an art professor at NYU.

content:
The map shows the result of 2018 United States House elections. However, the monochromatic yellow color light generated by LPS lamp makes the red and blue color in the map disappear, and you cannot really tell the result.
Date: November 2018
Material: Cotton, Low-pressure sodium (LPS) lamp
summary: The map shows the result of 2018 United States House elections. However, the monochromatic yellow color light generated by LPS lamp makes the red and blue color in the map disappear, and you cannot really tell the result.
title: 2018 United States House Elections

content:
I walked 2.649km and picked up 618 littered cigarette butts in Tokyo. On average, there was one cigarette butt for every 2.07 square meters. The line drawn with charcoal is the exact trace of my walking route.
Date: December 2016
Material: Craft Paper, Cigarette Butts, Charcoal
Size: 100cm207cm, 207cm207cm, 61.8cm*61.8cm
summary: I walked 2.649km and picked up 618 littered cigarette butts in Tokyo. On average, there was one cigarette butt for every 2.07 square meters. The line drawn with charcoal is the exact trace of my walking route.
title: One Cigarette Butt Per

content: Kumano Daigaku is a walking tour app featuring a Japanese novelist Kenji Nakagami. When you walk around the places described in his novel, you will get the phrases in the novel related to that place so that you can enjoy his novel more! It is developed with SCIVONE, LLC. and Makoto Ichikawa, an associate professor at Waseda University for the Summer seminar held by Kumanodaigaku.
summary: Kumano Daigaku is a walking tour app featuring a Japanese novelist Kenji Nakagami. When you walk around the places described in his novel, you will get the phrases in the novel related to that place so that you can enjoy his novel more! It is developed with SCIVONE, LLC. and Makoto Ichikawa, an associate professor at Waseda University for the Summer seminar held by Kumanodaigaku.
title: Kumano Daigaku

content:
MotionVideo is a video player which has speed change (slower&faster) and frame skip functions. You can play videos in your CameraRoll, videos synced from your computer and videos from YouTube.
For more details, please see https://apps.apple.com/us/app/motionvideo-video-player-slow-motion-frame-skip-function/id1079269774.
summary: MotionVideo is a video player which has speed change (slower&faster) and frame skip functions. You can play videos in your CameraRoll, videos synced from your computer and videos from YouTube.
title: Motion Video

content: Botsnew Player is a 360 degree VR video player, collaborated with Kadinche Corporation and MegaHouse Corporation. Visit https://botsnew.com/player.html for the details.
summary: Botsnew Player is a 360 degree VR video player, collaborated with Kadinche Corporation and MegaHouse Corporation. Visit https://botsnew.com/player.html for the details.

content:
SpeedPitch is an audio player for changing song’s speed and pitch. For all musicians who want to learn and play a song by ear! SpeedPitch is a music player to change speed and pitch of a song. Just load a song from your iPod library, then let’s start practicing! All you need to learn a song by ear is to practice over again, hope SpeedPitch can help you!
For more details, please see https://apps.apple.com/us/app/speedpitch-audio-player-for-changing-songs-speed-pitch/id939991904.
summary: For all musicians who want to learn and play a song by ear! SpeedPitch is a music player to change speed and pitch of a song. Just load a song from your iPod library, then let’s start practicing! All you need to learn a song by ear is to practice over again, hope SpeedPitch can help you!
title: Speed Pitch
